name: Tebra (Kareo + PatientPop) Practice Management API
what_it_does: Tebra REST API for independent medical practice management platform (merged Kareo + PatientPop). Enables AI agents to manage patient scheduling and online booking, access clinical documentation and EHR data, retrieve billing and revenue cycle data, handle insurance verification and claims, manage patient communications and marketing, access practice analytics and financial reporting, handle telehealth session data, and integrate front-office and back-office workflows for independent practices.
use_cases: Managing patient scheduling and online booking from independent practice automation agents
Accessing EHR and clinical notes from care coordination agents
Retrieving billing and collections data from revenue cycle automation agents
Integrating patient marketing and engagement from practice growth agents
not_for: Large health systems without independent small practice workflow focus
Hospital-based practices without front-office patient acquisition needs
High-volume clinics requiring enterprise EHR and complex clinical decision support
best_when: An independent physician practice, mental health group, or specialty clinic using Tebra (formerly Kareo) wants AI agents to automate patient scheduling, billing workflows, practice marketing, and revenue cycle management.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Patient PHI in clinical and billing records. Automated patient communications must comply with TCPA. Online reputation management features must comply with review manipulation prohibitions. Billing automation must avoid Medicare/Medicaid fraud risks.

auth.notes: Tebra uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Practice-level credentials with clinical, billing, and scheduling scopes. Developer portal with marketplace integrations. Webhooks for real-time clinical and billing events. Legacy Kareo API and new Tebra API coexist during transition.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; practice software subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-provider pricing; clinical and billing modules
pricing.notes: Irvine, California. Tebra formed 2022 from merger of Kareo (founded 2004) and PatientPop (founded 2014). Used by 100,000+ providers. Kareo was cloud-native billing platform; PatientPop was patient acquisition platform. Combined platform covers front-to-back independent practice operations. Strong independent practice market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Patient PHI across clinical and billing records requires BAA
Kareo API migration to Tebra API — some legacy endpoints still active during transition
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key REST API
TCPA compliance required for automated patient communication workflows
Online review automation is prohibited — patient satisfaction tools have limits
Merged platform has two legacy code bases — some API inconsistencies during integration period
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient PHI and billing data. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Post-merger API transition period.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Merged Kareo+PatientPop platform.
